chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP No.D-3524 of 2022 Date Order with signature of Judge(s) 1. For hearing of CMA No.15535/2022. 2. For hearing of Main Case. 23.12.2024 Mr. Shaheer Roshan, advocate for the petitioners. Ms. Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General. On the last date following orders was passed: “Per learned counsel this petition is covered by a Division Bench judgment of this court dated 21.11.2024 passed in CP D 3062 of 2020 [Sabre Travel Network Pakistan (Pvt.)Ltd. vs. Pakistan & Others], hence may be disposed of in terms thereto. Counsel for the department is called absent. As an indulgence adjourned to 23.12.2024. Issue notice to the respondents No.2 and 3 to ensure representation on the said date.” Today, Mr. Asad Aftab, advocate for respondent Nos.2 & 3, is present and states on behalf of the department that this Petition is covered as per the judgment as stated aforesaid. It is jointly stated that the Petition be disposed of in view of as supra. Order accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE M.Khan
